description: Create a real estate flyer for an Open House using LibreOffice Writer by processing the text in /home/ga/Documents/property_draft.docx. Format the line 'OPEN HOUSE - SUNDAY' as a centered, bold title with a font size of at least 24pt. Insert the image /home/ga/Documents/images/luxury_home.jpg below the address and resize it to fill the page width (approximately 6-7 inches). Organize the Description and Features text into a two-column section and format the features as a bulleted list. Save the final document as /home/ga/Documents/open_house_flyer.odt.
